summary: postmortem-maker is a published, installable runx skill (epistemedeus/postmortem-maker@sha-1d497f39e48b) that turns incident fragments — incident_timeline[], alerts[], deploy_events[], chat_notes[], and a postmortem_policy — into a traceable postmortem where every timeline entry and root-cause claim cites input evidence, unresolved facts go to unknowns[], and a gated publish_proposal for the doc-publisher executor is emitted only when the evidence is consistent — never posting or assigning anything. Local harness passed 3/3; the post-publish dogfood run on the consistent-evidence input sealed receipt runx:receipt:sha256:dcf429329ec50227edbe7c9a4285b5c2a92b6e9f5504ee7ba782090cbdf4c60c with root_cause determined, unknowns=0, action_items=2, and publish_proposal proposed, and runx verify returned valid.
note: Public key only — no secret. Anyone can verify the sealed dogfood receipt with the command above.
